nasb.text: They have built the high places of Topheth, which is in the valley of the son of Hinnom, to burn their sons and their daughters in the fire, which I did not command, and it did not come into My mind.

esv.text: And they have built the high places of Topheth, which is in the Valley of the Son of Hinnom, to burn their sons and their daughters in the fire, which I did not command, nor did it come into my mind.

cnv.text: “他們在欣嫩子谷中，建造了陀斐特的邱壇，用火焚燒自己的兒女；這不是我吩咐的，我也沒有在心裡想過。

ccb.text: 他们在欣嫩子谷的陀斐特建造丘坛，焚烧自己的儿女。我从未吩咐他们这样做，连想都没想过。这不是我的吩咐，我也从未这样想过。
